---
title: "6306 - Final Project Brainstorm"
author: "Josh"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
# install.packages("arrow")
library(arrow)
trips_01 <- read_parquet('/Users/joshtsamuel/SMU/DS-6306 Doing Data Science/Units/Final Project/Data/yellow_tripdata_2025-01.parquet')
trips_02 <- read_parquet('/Users/joshtsamuel/SMU/DS-6306 Doing Data Science/Units/Final Project/Data/yellow_tripdata_2025-02.parquet')
trips_03 <- read_parquet('/Users/joshtsamuel/SMU/DS-6306 Doing Data Science/Units/Final Project/Data/yellow_tripdata_2025-03.parquet')
trips_04 <- read_parquet('/Users/joshtsamuel/SMU/DS-6306 Doing Data Science/Units/Final Project/Data/yellow_tripdata_2025-04.parquet')

master = rbind(trips_01, trips_02, trips_03)

library(naniar)
gg_miss_var(master)

```
